name: Gary's Clam Dip
recipeIngredient: 1 each Sheepherder Bread, Round, large (or sourdough bread round)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the clams and reserve half a cup of the liquid.
2. Using an electric mixer, combine all ingredients except the bread in a bowl.
3. Slice off the top of the bread rounds.
4. Hollow out the bread rounds.
5. Fill the bread rounds with the dip mixture.
6. Replace the tops of the bread rounds.
7. Wrap the assembled bread rounds tightly in foil.
8. Bake at 250°F for 3 hours.
